customer.name: Navico
customer.note: Competitive bake-off vs Salesforce Service Cloud. Customer already uses D365 CS in basic case management mode — no channels configured. Focus: show the connected, modern omnichannel experience they're missing.

currentState.crm: Salesforce (Sales) + D365 Customer Service (basic case mgmt only)
painPoints: No screen pop — agent manually looks up B2B vs B2C caller
Single queue, no intelligent routing by tier, brand, or skill
No digital channels (chat, social) at all today
Portal KB is outdated — ServiceTarget app for Q&A, no AI or self-service
Managers manually categorizing cases that come in too generic
No WFM, no analytics dashboard, no proactive engagement
Siloed Sales (SFDC) + Service (D365) — no unified customer view
RMA process is partially manual, requires tech validation before ERP submission
Product registration and warranty lookup not integrated with CRM

focusAreas: Intelligent Case Routing by Brand, Tier, and Skill
Screen Pop with Customer 360 (B2B vs B2C identification)
Copilot Agent Assist — suggested replies, KB surfacing, case summarization
RMA Case Type Flows (Exchange, Credit, Repair, OBS)

brandDescriptions.Lowrance: Fish finders, chartplotters, and GPS navigation for recreational fishing and boating
brandDescriptions.Simrad: Professional-grade marine electronics for commercial and high-performance vessels

b2b.description: Tier 1 & 2 distributors and dealers — account-driven, highest volume EMEA

b2c.description: End consumers — larger volume in Americas, product registration + warranty focus

1.label: Platinum Expert
1.description: Top-tier distributors — dedicated support, fastest SLA, direct tech specialist access

3.label: Gold
3.description: Key dealers and distributors — standard business hours, 8-hour response

5.label: Consumer
5.description: B2C end users — self-service first, portal + email support

agentSkillTiers.tier1: General Support — basic inquiries, case creation, routing
agentSkillTiers.tier2: Technical Support — product troubleshooting, serial/warranty validation
agentSkillTiers.tier3: Senior Technical — advanced diagnostics, escalation handling
agentSkillTiers.tier4: Product Expert — brand specialist, RMA approvals, ERP submission authorization

agents.name: Emma Thompson
agents.focus: Inbound email, chat, phone — B2C recreational fishing customers

agents.name: Marco Rossi
agents.focus: RMA approvals, tech validation, B2B distributor escalations

agents.name: Sarah Mitchell
agents.focus: Queue oversight, analytics dashboard, case categorization, NPS review

customers.name: Jake Harrington
customers.title: Purchasing Manager
customers.scenario: Inbound phone — serial lookup, warranty validation, RMA Exchange request for Simrad NSX chartplotter fleet order

customers.name: Christine Delacroix
customers.title: Service Manager
customers.scenario: Live chat — B&G Triton2 instrument display technical issue, sailing race season urgent escalation

customers.name: Mike Torres
customers.title: Weekend Fisherman
customers.scenario: Inbound email — Lowrance HDS Live fish finder not powering on, warranty claim, product registered 14 months ago

scenario1.title: Voice: Inbound Call — Distributor RMA Request
highlights: Screen pop identifies Atlantic Marine Supply Co. as Platinum Tier B2B distributor
Customer 360: recent cases, open orders, account tier displayed instantly
Agent searches serial SIM-2024-NSX-10042 — warranty valid, RMA Exchange eligible
Copilot suggests RMA Exchange case type, pre-fills fields
Case auto-routed to Marco Rossi (Simrad Tier 4 specialist) for tech validation
ERP integration note shown: approved RMA triggers fulfillment line

scenario2.title: Chat: Platinum Expert Sailing Distributor — Urgent Escalation
highlights: Customer initiates chat from portal — Platinum Expert tier auto-escalates queue priority
Copilot agent assist surfaces B&G Triton2 known fault KB article in real time
Agent uses suggested reply to acknowledge and troubleshoot
Issue unresolved — Copilot summarizes case for escalation handoff
Supervisor Sarah sees live conversation in Omnichannel Insights dashboard

scenario3.title: Email: Consumer Warranty Claim — Lowrance HDS Live
highlights: Inbound email parsed by AI — intent = warranty claim, product = Lowrance HDS Live
Case auto-created, serial LWR-2024-HDS-88821 validated — warranty active (14 months)
Copilot drafts suggested response with next steps
SLA timer visible — consumer tier 8-hour response target
NPS survey auto-queued on case close

scenario4.title: Supervisor View: Analytics & Queue Intelligence
highlights: Omnichannel Insights: live queue health, agent utilization across email/chat/voice
Case volume by brand (Lowrance vs Simrad vs B&G) — like Navico's actual 52/48 split
Hot word alerts panel — 'Navigation Failure' case flagged in queue
Backlog aging report — cases without categories (Navico's current pain: managers manually tagging)
Copilot auto-categorization rate vs manual — showing time savings
